calcite.logical:
LogicalSystemLimit(fetch=[10000], type=[QUERY_SIZE_LIMIT])
  LogicalProject(created_at=[$0], server=[$1], @timestamp=[$2], message=[$3], level=[$4], earliest_message=[MIN_BY($3, $0) OVER (PARTITION BY $4)], latest_message=[MAX_BY($3, $0) OVER (PARTITION BY $4)])
    CalciteLogicalIndexScan(table=[[OpenSearch, opensearch-sql_test_index_logs]])
calcite.physical:
EnumerableLimit(fetch=[10000])
  EnumerableCalc(expr#0..13=[{inputs}], proj#0..4=[{exprs}], $5=[$t12], $6=[$t13])
    EnumerableWindow(window#0=[window(partition {4} aggs [MIN_BY($3, $0), MAX_BY($3, $0)])])
      CalciteEnumerableIndexScan(table=[[OpenSearch, opensearch-sql_test_index_logs]])
